title: Query Management
subtitle: Create, organize, and manage the queries AI engines will answer about your brand
createQuerySetHelp: A query set is the group of prompts you will generate, review, and run for this project.
querySetDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this query set...
emptyState: No query sets yet. Create one to start building your query library.
emptyStateDescription: Query sets are the containers you run against AI engines. Create one first, then fill it with queries and launch a run.

flow.createSetDescription: Use one set per workflow, market, or reporting period you want to track.
flow.addQueriesDescription: Draft with AI or add manual prompts, then keep the ones you actually want to monitor.
flow.runDescription: Once the set looks right, launch it against the engines from the Runs tab.

emptyQueries: No queries in this set yet. Generate queries or add your own from the actions above.
